title: UwU-craft
description: "uwu"-ifies all the text in the game, including the chat messages you send.
body:
UwU-ifies all of the text in the game. Even user-made text, and even what you type in chat!

![The Minecraft Pause Screen, with all of the r's and l's replaced with w's, in lowercase; along with all punctuation replaced with Tildas.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/046763edc2877fc9892a6201743ade08b9eabf75.png)
